robots.name: franka_fr3_revo2_right_robot

asset_local_coordinate_frame.axes: MuJoCo asset local frame per link

robots.mesh_pose: per-link poses stored in robot_body_pos_w and robot_body_quat_wxyz

vae_encodings.note: robot link meshes are stored as original professional STL/XML assets; per-link VAE matrices are not duplicated to avoid huge repeated archives

capture_assist.activation: disabled; true MuJoCo contact/friction/hand-control catch only
